text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't concentrate on my work, so I decide to
take a walk in the park, but when I get there...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: WATCH OUT!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whump!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Phew, made it! Sorry about that!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The kids I'm playing baseball with hit the ball all
the way over here!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Wait, did you not notice the ball at all?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Guess I arrived in the nick of time, then! Thank
goodness you didn't get hurt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like I'm more out of it than I realized. I
need to get back into gear, but...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey, you all right? You don't look so hot.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Why don't you come play ball with
us?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Swinging a bat and running around's sure to make
you feel better!
choice_data_list: Sorry, I still have work to do...
Sorry, I still have work to do...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Swinging a bat and running around's sure to make
you feel better!
choice_data_list: Sorry, I still have work to do...
Sorry, I still have work to do...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah! That's what I like to hear!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But before we head over to the field, here! Have
this nutrient-packed protein bar!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I always eat this to charge up my energy! It's sure
to get you back to full tank too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The bar is surprisingly filling and tasty! That, on
top of Ines Fujin's kindness, brings me back to full
energy!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Good! Looks like you're back in tip-top shape.
Those bars come in lots of different flavors, you
know!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Uhhh.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Well... The thing is, the bar I gave you was my last
one...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But, but! You don't have to worry about me! I'm
just glad you're feeling better!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Sides, I have a bunch more stocked up in my
room, so I'll just chow down on them when I get
back. ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome! Now that that's sorted out...
Let's play ball!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, I manage to recharge by playing
baseball with Ines Fujin!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Work sure is tough... It's always a huge test of
endurance when things get busy at my part-time
job too...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ooh, I've got an idea!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Trainer, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Trainer, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You can do it! Woo!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I was having a rough time with my
training or work, my little sisters would always
cheer for me like this.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
They would use their whole bodies and shout as
loud as they could! It always made me so happy!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Needless to say, I can vouch for this method's
effectiveness!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But, uh, that was pretty childish of me to do,
huh... Ohh, now I'm getting all embarrassed!
choice_data_list:
Your cheers and cuteness were both super
effective!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Argh, stop making fun of me already!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
A-anyway, here! You gotta fill up your body's
energy reserves too!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
This is my favorite drink, so chug it down so you
can work hard!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her warm encouragement and the
sports drink she gave me, I'm able to breeze
through my workload without an issue!
